_comment: A/B TEST PROFILE. Identical to oguri_cap.json EXCEPT training_scorer_mode is 'authoritative' and the override margin gate is opened to 0 (override_margin_pct/floor = 0) so the ported Android training_scorer.py drives the per-turn pick on EVERY disagreement with the legacy mant.py strategy engine -- this is the clean test of 'does the Android-equivalent formula produce better stats'. NOT for normal use: with the gate at 0 the scorer overrides aggressively and may flap on near-ties. To run a gentler blend instead, raise override_margin_pct toward 0.10 / override_margin_floor toward 1.0 (the shipped authoritative defaults). ACTIVATION: this file is inert until index.json points an Oguri card_id/chara_id at 'oguri_cap_authoritative' (by_card_id wins at runtime). Compare end-of-career final_fans/final_rating/stat line in career_summaries.jsonl against a run on the default 'oguri_cap' profile.

4._comment: Trackblazer scenario 4 -- solver overrides copied verbatim from oguri_cap.json so the ONLY variable between the two profiles is the training-decision engine (mant strategy vs ported Android scorer). Race scheduling is held constant.
